title: ctenitis cyclochlamys
intro: Ctenitis cyclochlamys, also known as the umbrella fern, is a type of fern native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Ctenitis cyclochlamys include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. Ctenitis cyclochlamys can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
